mapper.sql: id, title, business_type, method, request_method, operator_type, oper_name, dept_name, oper_url, oper_ip, oper_location, oper_param, json_result, status, error_msg, oper_time, cost_time
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO sys_oper_log ( title, business_type, method, request_method, operator_type, oper_name, dept_name, oper_url, oper_ip, oper_location, oper_param, json_result, status, error_msg, oper_time, cost_time ) VALUES
(#{item.title}, #{item.businessType}, #{item.method}, #{item.requestMethod}, #{item.operatorType}, #{item.operName}, #{item.deptName}, #{item.operUrl}, #{item.operIp}, #{item.operLocation}, #{item.operParam}, #{item.jsonResult}, #{item.status}, #{item.errorMsg}, #{item.operTime}, #{item.costTime})
